description: French (Metropolitan) language pack for adult real-world learning. Meets the §10.1 MVP Seed Pack Target in full: 300 vocabulary, 75 core phrases, 25 grammar points, 25 dialogues, 20+ slang/register items, 20 pronunciation drills, 10 listening exercises, 10 writing prompts, 10 assessments, 5 roleplay scenarios.
coverage: A1-A2 everyday + adult real-world speech: courtesy through profanity (severity 1-7, with recognize-only/avoid guidance), the tu/vous register system as a first-class topic (the single highest-stakes social choice a learner makes in French), spoken-French reality (dropped ne in negation, 'on' instead of 'nous', elision, everyday verlan), and the pronunciation features with no clean English analog (four nasal vowels, u vs ou, the uvular r, liaison, silent final consonants, e muet). Grammar covers the A1-A2 load-bearing core: articles and gender, -er/-ir/-re conjugation plus the key irregulars, negation, question formation, adjective agreement and placement, partitives, à/de contractions, passé composé with avoir and être, reflexive verbs, futur proche, an imparfait introduction, object pronouns, y/en, comparatives, and the imperative.
editorialNotes: Metropolitan French only — Quebec, Belgian, Swiss, and African francophone variation is explicitly out of scope for this pack version (flagged in NATIVE_REVIEW.md as a scope decision, not an oversight). Identity-based slurs were deliberately EXCLUDED from the profanity set pending explicit owner review of framing before any inclusion, even as recognize-only — the same policy as pt-br. See NATIVE_REVIEW.md for items flagged for a native speaker's sign-off.
